title: Equipment & IP Dependency
description: Governs reliance on OEM-supplied equipment and manufacturing intellectual property.

title: Marketplace Matching Dependency
description: Governs the coupling between marketplace matching logic and downstream capacity providers.

title: Capacity Single-Sourcing Dependency
description: Flags dependency on a single manufacturing capacity provider without qualified alternates.

title: Customer Demand Dependency
description: Governs the coupling between customer demand volatility and committed capacity.

title: Logistics Coordination Dependency
description: Governs reliance on logistics actors for fulfillment coordination across the ecosystem.

title: Last-Mile Fulfillment Dependency
description: Governs the dependency between fulfillment coordination and final customer delivery.

title: Financial Underwriting Dependency
description: Governs reliance on financial/insurance providers for trade credit and risk pooling.

title: Data Flow Sovereignty Dependency
description: Governs cross-actor data flows that must remain compliant with data sovereignty rules.

title: Security Dependency
description: Governs reliance on the Security Provider to protect platform-critical data and infrastructure.

title: Interoperability Dependency
description: Governs reliance on shared technical/data interoperability standards across platform actors.

title: Circular Material Dependency
description: Governs the dependency loop between manufacturing output and end-of-life material recovery.

title: Platform Concentration Dependency
description: Flags excessive concentration of orchestration or transaction volume on a single platform actor, creating a single point of failure.

title: Certification Dependency
description: Governs reliance on certification bodies before capacity or output can be listed as compliant.

title: Workforce Skills Dependency
description: Governs reliance on workforce/training providers to sustain qualified operating capacity.
